_comment: Veterans Group Life Insurance — age-banded premium table. Coverage $10k-$500k in $10k increments. Premium is a DEDUCTION, not income.

premium_per_10k_monthly._comment: Monthly cost per $10,000 of coverage, by age band. Multiply by (coverage / 10000) for total monthly premium.

_note: Premiums increase sharply at each age band — this is a significant retirement expense. Engine should project future premiums based on veteran's age trajectory. Coverage max $500k.
